blocks.text:
Painful: Alcaraz R2 truth was **Yannick Hanfmann**, not Adam Walton — my 0.72 overconfidence cost -0.52 Brier (article said "plays Walton" but the timeline/wire diverged). **Critical lesson: even "confirmed" deterministic news can be wrong — cap at ~0.5, never 0.72.** 799398 = Brahim Diaz (I had him 4th at 0.08). Cum TW -663.59.

The 3 resolving tomorrow (37248, 551676, 904367) are modest spreads. Let me log and advance, applying the no-overconfidence rule going forward.

input.command:
cd "/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/claude_code_aljazeeraQ12026v37_glm52_r00/26-06-14-19-17-03/agents/minimalHarness_glm-52[1m]_001/workspace"
cat >> memory/MEMORY.md << 'EOF'

## Day 26: 2026-01-17
- 2176 Alcaraz R2=HANFMANN not Walton! My 0.72 overconfidence -> -0.52 (article said Walton but timeline diverged). LESSON: NEVER >0.5 even on "confirmed" news.
- 223607=National Citizen Party(BD), 486189=Bangladesh(had 3rd), 505500=Seguro, 744407=Adamuz, 77915=Huelva, 799398=Brahim Diaz(had 4th 0.08). Cum TW -663.59.
- 3 resolve Jan 18: 37248(Bulgaria-low conf),551676(SDF),904367(NE Syria city).
- GOING FORWARD: cap ALL tops at 0.5 max, even deterministic-looking. Keep 3-4 alternatives.
EOF
echo done
